metadata.description: Gold-standard Text-to-SQL training dataset for TAT questions. Covers geofence hierarchy, invisible time, border efficiency, and trip completion metrics.

geofence_visits.description: Each row is one geofence visit: a vehicle entering and leaving a named zone.

training_data.question: How many trips went through Kurasini port in the last 30 days?
training_data.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM geofence_visits WHERE geofence_name = 'KURASINI ALL TOGETHER' AND in_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';
training_data.explanation: Simple count of visits to the Kurasini mega-geofence within the last 30 days.

training_data.question: Which trucks visited Tunduma border today?
training_data.sql: SELECT DISTINCT tracker_id FROM geofence_visits WHERE geofence_name = 'TUNDUMA BORDER TZ SIDE' AND in_time_dt::date = CURRENT_DATE;
training_data.explanation: Distinct tracker IDs that entered the Tunduma TZ-side geofence today.

training_data.question: How long did truck 12345 stay at Nakonde border?
training_data.sql: SELECT tracker_id, in_time_dt, out_time_dt, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (out_time_dt - in_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS dwell_hours FROM geofence_visits WHERE tracker_id = 12345 AND geofence_name = 'NAKONDE BORDER ZMB SIDE' ORDER BY in_time_dt DESC LIMIT 1;
training_data.explanation: Computes dwell time in hours for the most recent visit of a specific truck at Nakonde.

training_data.question: List all geofence visits for tracker 67890 in the last 7 days.
training_data.sql: SELECT geofence_name, in_time_dt, out_time_dt, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (out_time_dt - in_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS dwell_hours FROM geofence_visits WHERE tracker_id = 67890 AND in_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY in_time_dt;
training_data.explanation: Full chronological visit log for one tracker over the past week.

training_data.question: How many trucks are currently at the ASAS Kibaha yard?
training_data.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tracker_id) AS trucks_present FROM geofence_visits WHERE geofence_name = 'Asas Kibaha Dsm -Yard' AND in_time_dt IS NOT NULL AND out_time_dt IS NULL;
training_data.explanation: Trucks that have entered but not yet exited the yard (still inside).

training_data.question: What is the average dwell time at Kasumbalesa border (ZMB side) this month?
training_data.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (out_time_dt - in_time_dt)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_dwell_hours FROM geofence_visits WHERE geofence_name = 'KASUMBALESA ZMB SIDE' AND in_time_dt >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND out_time_dt IS NOT NULL;
training_data.explanation: Average time spent at the Kasumbalesa ZMB-side border for the current month.

training_data.question: Show me the 10 longest border stops this week.
training_data.sql: SELECT tracker_id, geofence_name, in_time_dt, out_time_dt, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (out_time_dt - in_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS dwell_hours FROM geofence_visits WHERE geofence_name IN ('TUNDUMA BORDER TZ SIDE', 'NAKONDE BORDER ZMB SIDE', 'KASUMBALESA ZMB SIDE', 'KASUMBALESA BORDER  DRC SIDE', 'SAKANIA ZMB SIDE', 'SAKANIA DRC') AND in_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND out_time_dt IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dwell_hours DESC LIMIT 10;
training_data.explanation: Top 10 longest visits at any border geofence in the last 7 days.

training_data.question: How many trucks visited any Kurasini depot yesterday?
training_data.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tracker_id) AS truck_count FROM geofence_visits WHERE geofence_name IN ('[MERU TERMINAL DEPOT]', '[WORLD OIL DEPOT]', '[TIPER DEPOT]', '[MOGAS OIL DEPOT]', '[ORYX FUEL DEPOT]', '[SUPERSTAR FUEL DEPOT]', '[OILCOM LIMITED TERMINAL DEPOT]', '[GBP DRS DEPOT]', '[Puma Depo Kurasini]', '[Oryx Loading Depo (Kigamboni)]') AND in_time_dt::date = CURRENT_DATE - 1;
training_data.explanation: Distinct truck count across all Kurasini-area depots for yesterday.

training_data.question: What is the average mobilization lag from yard to Kurasini port in the last 30 days?
training_data.sql: WITH mobil_lags AS ( SELECT t1.tracker_id, t1.out_time_dt AS yard_exit, t2.in_time_dt AS kurasini_entry, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS lag_hours FROM geofence_visits t1 JOIN geofence_visits t2 ON t1.tracker_id = t2.tracker_id WHERE t1.geofence_name IN ('ASAS DSM Office / Dar W/Shop', 'Asas Kibaha Dsm -Yard') AND t2.geofence_name = 'KURASINI ALL TOGETHER' AND t2.in_time_dt > t1.out_time_dt AND t1.out_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '5 days' ) SELECT ROUND(AVG(lag_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_mobilization_hours, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lag_hours)::numeric, 2) AS median_mobilization_hours, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM mobil_lags;
training_data.explanation: Joins yard exits to the next Kurasini entry for the same tracker. Caps at 5-day window to avoid false matches. Returns avg, median, and count.

training_data.question: What is the average border crossing time from Tunduma (TZ) to Nakonde (ZMB)?
training_data.sql: WITH border_waits AS ( SELECT t1.tracker_id, t1.out_time_dt AS tz_exit, t2.in_time_dt AS zmb_entry, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS wait_hours FROM geofence_visits t1 JOIN geofence_visits t2 ON t1.tracker_id = t2.tracker_id WHERE t1.geofence_name = 'TUNDUMA BORDER TZ SIDE' AND t2.geofence_name = 'NAKONDE BORDER ZMB SIDE' AND t2.in_time_dt > t1.out_time_dt AND t1.out_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '2 days' ) SELECT ROUND(AVG(wait_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_wait_hours, ROUND(MIN(wait_hours)::numeric, 2) AS min_wait_hours, ROUND(MAX(wait_hours)::numeric, 2) AS max_wait_hours, COUNT(*) AS crossing_count FROM border_waits;
training_data.explanation: Measures the gap between exiting Tunduma TZ geofence and entering Nakonde ZMB geofence. This gap is the border dwell / processing time.

training_data.question: Show daily average border wait at Kasumbalesa for the last 2 weeks.
training_data.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', t1.out_time_dt)::date AS day_date, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_wait_hours, COUNT(*)::integer AS truck_count FROM geofence_visits t1 JOIN geofence_visits t2 ON t1.tracker_id = t2.tracker_id WHERE t1.geofence_name = 'KASUMBALESA ZMB SIDE' AND t2.geofence_name = 'KASUMBALESA BORDER  DRC SIDE' AND t2.in_time_dt > t1.out_time_dt AND t1.out_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '2 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
training_data.explanation: Daily trend of Kasumbalesa ZMB->DRC border crossing time over the past 14 days.

training_data.question: What percentage of trucks that left the yard actually reached the offloading destination?
training_data.sql: WITH yard_departures AS ( SELECT DISTINCT tracker_id FROM geofence_visits WHERE geofence_name IN ('ASAS DSM Office / Dar W/Shop', 'Asas Kibaha Dsm -Yard') AND out_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ), reached_offload AS ( SELECT DISTINCT gv.tracker_id FROM geofence_visits gv INNER JOIN yard_departures yd ON gv.tracker_id = yd.tracker_id WHERE gv.geofence_name IN ('Ndola Offloading', 'Kolwezi Offloading', 'LUSAKA DEPOT', 'Frontier', 'United Petroleum Lubumbashi', 'Lilongwe', 'Mzuzu Offloading', 'LUALABA OIL (KOLWEZI)', 'KANATA PETROLEUM DEPOT (CONSTALINA)', 'EXPREE OIL DEPOT', 'DRC Offloading GEO') AND gv.in_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ) SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM yard_departures) AS total_departed, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reached_offload) AS total_completed, ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reached_offload) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM yard_departures), 0), 1) AS completion_rate_pct;
training_data.explanation: Trip completion rate: trucks that left any ASAS yard AND later appeared at any offloading destination within 30 days.

training_data.question: What is the average invisible time for trucks between Kurasini and Tunduma?
training_data.sql: WITH trip_legs AS ( SELECT t1.tracker_id, t1.out_time_dt AS kurasini_exit, t2.in_time_dt AS tunduma_entry, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS transit_hours FROM geofence_visits t1 JOIN geofence_visits t2 ON t1.tracker_id = t2.tracker_id WHERE t1.geofence_name = 'KURASINI ALL TOGETHER' AND t2.geofence_name = 'TUNDUMA BORDER TZ SIDE' AND t2.in_time_dt > t1.out_time_dt AND t1.out_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '7 days' ), waypoint_time AS ( SELECT tl.tracker_id, tl.kurasini_exit, SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (gv.out_time_dt - gv.in_time_dt)) / 3600.0) AS visible_stop_hours FROM trip_legs tl JOIN geofence_visits gv ON gv.tracker_id = tl.tracker_id AND gv.in_time_dt BETWEEN tl.kurasini_exit AND tl.tunduma_entry AND gv.geofence_name NOT IN ('KURASINI ALL TOGETHER', 'TUNDUMA BORDER TZ SIDE') GROUP BY tl.tracker_id, tl.kurasini_exit ) SELECT ROUND(AVG(tl.transit_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_total_transit_hours, ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(wt.visible_stop_hours, 0))::numeric, 2) AS avg_visible_stop_hours, ROUND(AVG(tl.transit_hours - COALESCE(wt.visible_stop_hours, 0))::numeric, 2) AS avg_invisible_hours FROM trip_legs tl LEFT JOIN waypoint_time wt ON tl.tracker_id = wt.tracker_id AND tl.kurasini_exit = wt.kurasini_exit;
training_data.explanation: Invisible time = Total transit time minus time spent at known waypoint geofences. This is time unaccounted for between Kurasini and Tunduma.

training_data.question: Which depot in Kurasini has the longest average loading time?
training_data.sql: SELECT geofence_name AS depot, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (out_time_dt - in_time_dt)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_loading_hours, COUNT(*) AS visit_count FROM geofence_visits WHERE geofence_name IN ('[MERU TERMINAL DEPOT]', '[WORLD OIL DEPOT]', '[TIPER DEPOT]', '[MOGAS OIL DEPOT]', '[ORYX FUEL DEPOT]', '[SUPERSTAR FUEL DEPOT]', '[OILCOM LIMITED TERMINAL DEPOT]', '[GBP DRS DEPOT]', '[Puma Depo Kurasini]', '[Oryx Loading Depo (Kigamboni)]') AND in_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND out_time_dt IS NOT NULL GROUP BY geofence_name ORDER BY avg_loading_hours DESC;
training_data.explanation: Ranks Kurasini-area depots by average dwell time, highlighting loading bottlenecks.

training_data.question: Compare Tunduma/Nakonde vs Kasumbalesa border wait times this month.
training_data.sql: WITH tunduma AS ( SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS wait_hours FROM geofence_visits t1 JOIN geofence_visits t2 ON t1.tracker_id = t2.tracker_id WHERE t1.geofence_name = 'TUNDUMA BORDER TZ SIDE' AND t2.geofence_name = 'NAKONDE BORDER ZMB SIDE' AND t2.in_time_dt > t1.out_time_dt AND t1.out_time_dt >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '2 days' ), kasumbalesa AS ( SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS wait_hours FROM geofence_visits t1 JOIN geofence_visits t2 ON t1.tracker_id = t2.tracker_id WHERE t1.geofence_name = 'KASUMBALESA ZMB SIDE' AND t2.geofence_name = 'KASUMBALESA BORDER  DRC SIDE' AND t2.in_time_dt > t1.out_time_dt AND t1.out_time_dt >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '2 days' ) SELECT 'Tunduma/Nakonde' AS border, ROUND(AVG(wait_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_hours, COUNT(*) AS crossings FROM tunduma UNION ALL SELECT 'Kasumbalesa', ROUND(AVG(wait_hours)::numeric, 2), COUNT(*) FROM kasumbalesa;
training_data.explanation: Side-by-side comparison of the two main border crossings for the current month.

training_data.question: Show me the mobilization lag trend by week for the last 3 months.
training_data.sql: WITH mobil_lags AS ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', t1.out_time_dt)::date AS week_start, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS lag_hours FROM geofence_visits t1 JOIN geofence_visits t2 ON t1.tracker_id = t2.tracker_id WHERE t1.geofence_name IN ('ASAS DSM Office / Dar W/Shop', 'Asas Kibaha Dsm -Yard') AND t2.geofence_name = 'KURASINI ALL TOGETHER' AND t2.in_time_dt > t1.out_time_dt AND t1.out_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '3 months' AND (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '5 days' ) SELECT week_start, ROUND(AVG(lag_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_lag_hours, COUNT(*) AS trip_count FROM mobil_lags GROUP BY week_start ORDER BY week_start;
training_data.explanation: Weekly aggregation of Yard->Kurasini mobilization lag over 3 months. Useful for spotting operational trends.

training_data.question: What is the average time trucks spend at each waypoint between DSM and Tunduma?
training_data.sql: SELECT geofence_name AS waypoint, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (out_time_dt - in_time_dt)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_stop_hours, COUNT(*) AS visit_count FROM geofence_visits WHERE geofence_name IN ('Misugusugu Check Point', 'RUVU', 'MLANDIZI WASHING BAY', 'MIKUMI', 'RUAHA MBUYUNI', 'Makambako', 'Mbeya', 'UYOLE  MIZANI', 'TUKUYU (USHILIKA)') AND in_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND out_time_dt IS NOT NULL GROUP BY geofence_name ORDER BY avg_stop_hours DESC;
training_data.explanation: Average dwell at each TZ waypoint geofence, ranking by stop duration to identify delays.

training_data.question: Which truck has the most border crossings this month?
training_data.sql: SELECT tracker_id, COUNT(*) AS crossing_count FROM geofence_visits WHERE geofence_name IN ('TUNDUMA BORDER TZ SIDE', 'NAKONDE BORDER ZMB SIDE', 'KASUMBALESA ZMB SIDE', 'KASUMBALESA BORDER  DRC SIDE', 'SAKANIA ZMB SIDE', 'SAKANIA DRC') AND in_time_dt >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY tracker_id ORDER BY crossing_count DESC LIMIT 5;
training_data.explanation: Top 5 trucks by border visits this month — identifies the most active cross-border vehicles.

training_data.question: Calculate the full trip invisible time breakdown: Yard to Kurasini, Kurasini to Tunduma, Tunduma to Offloading.
training_data.sql: WITH trip_chain AS ( SELECT y.tracker_id, y.out_time_dt AS yard_exit, k.in_time_dt AS kurasini_entry, k.out_time_dt AS kurasini_exit, t.in_time_dt AS tunduma_entry, t.out_time_dt AS tunduma_exit, n.in_time_dt AS nakonde_entry FROM geofence_visits y JOIN geofence_visits k ON y.tracker_id = k.tracker_id AND k.geofence_name = 'KURASINI ALL TOGETHER' AND k.in_time_dt > y.out_time_dt AND (k.in_time_dt - y.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '5 days' JOIN geofence_visits t ON y.tracker_id = t.tracker_id AND t.geofence_name = 'TUNDUMA BORDER TZ SIDE' AND t.in_time_dt > k.out_time_dt AND (t.in_time_dt - k.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '7 days' JOIN geofence_visits n ON y.tracker_id = n.tracker_id AND n.geofence_name = 'NAKONDE BORDER ZMB SIDE' AND n.in_time_dt > t.out_time_dt AND (n.in_time_dt - t.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '2 days' WHERE y.geofence_name IN ('ASAS DSM Office / Dar W/Shop', 'Asas Kibaha Dsm -Yard') AND y.out_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' ) SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (kurasini_entry - yard_exit)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_yard_to_kurasini_hrs, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (kurasini_exit - kurasini_entry)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_kurasini_dwell_hrs, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tunduma_entry - kurasini_exit)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_kurasini_to_tunduma_hrs, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (tunduma_exit - tunduma_entry)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_tunduma_dwell_hrs, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nakonde_entry - tunduma_exit)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_border_crossing_hrs, ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nakonde_entry - yard_exit)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_total_trip_hrs, COUNT(*) AS complete_trips FROM trip_chain;
training_data.explanation: Full trip chain reconstruction: Yard -> Kurasini -> Tunduma -> Nakonde. Breaks down every leg's duration to identify where time is lost.

training_data.question: For each truck, calculate invisible time as a percentage of total trip time between Kurasini and the first offloading destination.
training_data.sql: WITH trip_legs AS ( SELECT k.tracker_id, k.out_time_dt AS kurasini_exit, ( SELECT MIN(o.in_time_dt) FROM geofence_visits o WHERE o.tracker_id = k.tracker_id AND o.geofence_name IN ('Ndola Offloading', 'Kolwezi Offloading', 'LUSAKA DEPOT', 'Frontier', 'United Petroleum Lubumbashi', 'DRC Offloading GEO') AND o.in_time_dt > k.out_time_dt AND (o.in_time_dt - k.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '14 days' ) AS offload_entry FROM geofence_visits k WHERE k.geofence_name = 'KURASINI ALL TOGETHER' AND k.out_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' AND k.out_time_dt IS NOT NULL ), valid_trips AS ( SELECT * FROM trip_legs WHERE offload_entry IS NOT NULL ), visible AS ( SELECT vt.tracker_id, vt.kurasini_exit, COALESCE(SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (gv.out_time_dt - gv.in_time_dt)) / 3600.0), 0) AS visible_hours FROM valid_trips vt LEFT JOIN geofence_visits gv ON gv.tracker_id = vt.tracker_id AND gv.in_time_dt BETWEEN vt.kurasini_exit AND vt.offload_entry AND gv.out_time_dt IS NOT NULL GROUP BY vt.tracker_id, vt.kurasini_exit ) SELECT vt.tracker_id, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (vt.offload_entry - vt.kurasini_exit)) / 3600.0, 2) AS total_hours, ROUND(v.visible_hours::numeric, 2) AS visible_hours, ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (vt.offload_entry - vt.kurasini_exit)) / 3600.0 - v.visible_hours)::numeric, 2) AS invisible_hours, ROUND(100.0 * (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (vt.offload_entry - vt.kurasini_exit)) / 3600.0 - v.visible_hours) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (vt.offload_entry - vt.kurasini_exit)) / 3600.0, 0), 1) AS invisible_pct FROM valid_trips vt JOIN visible v ON vt.tracker_id = v.tracker_id AND vt.kurasini_exit = v.kurasini_exit ORDER BY invisible_pct DESC;
training_data.explanation: Per-truck invisible time analysis. Invisible % = (total transit - time in known geofences) / total transit. High invisible % flags potential unauthorized stops.

training_data.question: Build a trip funnel: how many trucks pass each checkpoint from Yard to Offloading?
training_data.sql: WITH yard_starts AS ( SELECT DISTINCT tracker_id FROM geofence_visits WHERE geofence_name IN ('ASAS DSM Office / Dar W/Shop', 'Asas Kibaha Dsm -Yard') AND out_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' ), checkpoints AS ( SELECT 1 AS step, 'Yard Departure' AS checkpoint, COUNT(*) AS trucks FROM yard_starts UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'Kurasini Port', COUNT(DISTINCT gv.tracker_id) FROM geofence_visits gv INNER JOIN yard_starts ys ON gv.tracker_id = ys.tracker_id WHERE gv.geofence_name = 'KURASINI ALL TOGETHER' AND gv.in_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' UNION ALL SELECT 3, 'Tunduma Border TZ', COUNT(DISTINCT gv.tracker_id) FROM geofence_visits gv INNER JOIN yard_starts ys ON gv.tracker_id = ys.tracker_id WHERE gv.geofence_name = 'TUNDUMA BORDER TZ SIDE' AND gv.in_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' UNION ALL SELECT 4, 'Nakonde Border ZMB', COUNT(DISTINCT gv.tracker_id) FROM geofence_visits gv INNER JOIN yard_starts ys ON gv.tracker_id = ys.tracker_id WHERE gv.geofence_name = 'NAKONDE BORDER ZMB SIDE' AND gv.in_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' UNION ALL SELECT 5, 'Offloading Destination', COUNT(DISTINCT gv.tracker_id) FROM geofence_visits gv INNER JOIN yard_starts ys ON gv.tracker_id = ys.tracker_id WHERE gv.geofence_name IN ('Ndola Offloading', 'Kolwezi Offloading', 'LUSAKA DEPOT', 'Frontier', 'United Petroleum Lubumbashi', 'DRC Offloading GEO', 'Lilongwe', 'Mzuzu Offloading') AND gv.in_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' ) SELECT step, checkpoint, trucks, ROUND(100.0 * trucks / NULLIF(FIRST_VALUE(trucks) OVER (ORDER BY step), 0), 1) AS retention_pct FROM checkpoints ORDER BY step;
training_data.explanation: Trip funnel showing drop-off at each checkpoint. Retention % shows what fraction of yard-departing trucks reach each stage.

training_data.question: Identify trucks that spent more than 24 hours at any border crossing and show their full trip timeline.
training_data.sql: WITH long_border_stops AS ( SELECT tracker_id, geofence_name, in_time_dt, out_time_dt, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (out_time_dt - in_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS dwell_hours FROM geofence_visits WHERE geofence_name IN ('TUNDUMA BORDER TZ SIDE', 'NAKONDE BORDER ZMB SIDE', 'KASUMBALESA ZMB SIDE', 'KASUMBALESA BORDER  DRC SIDE', 'SAKANIA ZMB SIDE', 'SAKANIA DRC') AND out_time_dt IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (out_time_dt - in_time_dt)) / 3600.0 > 24 AND in_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ) SELECT lbs.tracker_id, lbs.geofence_name AS stuck_at_border, ROUND(lbs.dwell_hours::numeric, 1) AS border_dwell_hours, gv.geofence_name AS visit_zone, gv.in_time_dt, gv.out_time_dt FROM long_border_stops lbs JOIN geofence_visits gv ON gv.tracker_id = lbs.tracker_id AND gv.in_time_dt BETWEEN (lbs.in_time_dt - INTERVAL '3 days') AND (lbs.out_time_dt + INTERVAL '3 days') ORDER BY lbs.tracker_id, gv.in_time_dt;
training_data.explanation: Finds trucks stuck at borders for 24+ hours and reconstructs their geofence visit timeline +-3 days around the incident.

training_data.question: What is the fleet-wide invisible time ratio by corridor (DSM-Tunduma vs DSM-Kasumbalesa)?
training_data.sql: WITH dsm_tunduma AS ( SELECT t1.tracker_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS total_hours, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (gv.out_time_dt - gv.in_time_dt)) / 3600.0) FROM geofence_visits gv WHERE gv.tracker_id = t1.tracker_id AND gv.in_time_dt BETWEEN t1.out_time_dt AND t2.in_time_dt AND gv.out_time_dt IS NOT NULL ), 0) AS visible_hours FROM geofence_visits t1 JOIN geofence_visits t2 ON t1.tracker_id = t2.tracker_id WHERE t1.geofence_name = 'KURASINI ALL TOGETHER' AND t2.geofence_name = 'TUNDUMA BORDER TZ SIDE' AND t2.in_time_dt > t1.out_time_dt AND t1.out_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' AND (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '7 days' ), dsm_kasumbalesa AS ( SELECT t1.tracker_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS total_hours, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (gv.out_time_dt - gv.in_time_dt)) / 3600.0) FROM geofence_visits gv WHERE gv.tracker_id = t1.tracker_id AND gv.in_time_dt BETWEEN t1.out_time_dt AND t2.in_time_dt AND gv.out_time_dt IS NOT NULL ), 0) AS visible_hours FROM geofence_visits t1 JOIN geofence_visits t2 ON t1.tracker_id = t2.tracker_id WHERE t1.geofence_name = 'KURASINI ALL TOGETHER' AND t2.geofence_name = 'KASUMBALESA ZMB SIDE' AND t2.in_time_dt > t1.out_time_dt AND t1.out_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' AND (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '14 days' ) SELECT 'DSM → Tunduma' AS corridor, ROUND(AVG(total_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_total_hrs, ROUND(AVG(visible_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_visible_hrs, ROUND(AVG(total_hours - visible_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_invisible_hrs, ROUND(100.0 * AVG(total_hours - visible_hours) / NULLIF(AVG(total_hours), 0), 1) AS invisible_pct, COUNT(*) AS trips FROM dsm_tunduma UNION ALL SELECT 'DSM → Kasumbalesa', ROUND(AVG(total_hours)::numeric, 2), ROUND(AVG(visible_hours)::numeric, 2), ROUND(AVG(total_hours - visible_hours)::numeric, 2), ROUND(100.0 * AVG(total_hours - visible_hours) / NULLIF(AVG(total_hours), 0), 1), COUNT(*) FROM dsm_kasumbalesa;
training_data.explanation: Compares invisible time ratio across the two main corridors. Higher invisible % on a corridor suggests more unauthorized stops or poor geofence coverage.

training_data.question: Calculate the end-to-end trip duration percentiles (P50, P75, P90, P95) from Yard to final Offloading.
training_data.sql: WITH full_trips AS ( SELECT y.tracker_id, y.out_time_dt AS yard_exit, ( SELECT MIN(o.in_time_dt) FROM geofence_visits o WHERE o.tracker_id = y.tracker_id AND o.geofence_name IN ('Ndola Offloading', 'Kolwezi Offloading', 'LUSAKA DEPOT', 'Frontier', 'United Petroleum Lubumbashi', 'DRC Offloading GEO', 'Lilongwe', 'Mzuzu Offloading', 'LUALABA OIL (KOLWEZI)') AND o.in_time_dt > y.out_time_dt AND (o.in_time_dt - y.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '21 days' ) AS offload_entry FROM geofence_visits y WHERE y.geofence_name IN ('ASAS DSM Office / Dar W/Shop', 'Asas Kibaha Dsm -Yard') AND y.out_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ), completed AS ( SELECT tracker_id, yard_exit, offload_entry, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (offload_entry - yard_exit)) / 3600.0 AS trip_hours FROM full_trips WHERE offload_entry IS NOT NULL ) SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_trips, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY trip_hours)::numeric, 1) AS p50_hours, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY trip_hours)::numeric, 1) AS p75_hours, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.90) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY trip_hours)::numeric, 1) AS p90_hours, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY trip_hours)::numeric, 1) AS p95_hours, ROUND(AVG(trip_hours)::numeric, 1) AS avg_hours FROM completed;
training_data.explanation: Percentile distribution of full trip durations. P90/P95 highlight outlier trips that took abnormally long.

training_data.question: Show the hour-of-day pattern for border crossings at Tunduma — when do trucks typically arrive and how long do they wait?
training_data.sql: WITH arrivals AS ( SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t1.in_time_dt) AS arrival_hour, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t1.out_time_dt - t1.in_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS tz_dwell_hours, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS crossing_gap_hours FROM geofence_visits t1 JOIN geofence_visits t2 ON t1.tracker_id = t2.tracker_id WHERE t1.geofence_name = 'TUNDUMA BORDER TZ SIDE' AND t2.geofence_name = 'NAKONDE BORDER ZMB SIDE' AND t2.in_time_dt > t1.out_time_dt AND t1.in_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' AND (t2.in_time_dt - t1.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '2 days' AND t1.out_time_dt IS NOT NULL ) SELECT arrival_hour::integer, COUNT(*) AS truck_count, ROUND(AVG(tz_dwell_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_tz_side_dwell_hrs, ROUND(AVG(crossing_gap_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_crossing_gap_hrs FROM arrivals GROUP BY arrival_hour ORDER BY arrival_hour;
training_data.explanation: Hourly pattern analysis: shows which hours have the most arrivals and whether arrival timing affects wait times.

training_data.question: Flag trucks with invisible time above fleet average and show where they were last seen before going dark.
training_data.sql: WITH trip_legs AS ( SELECT k.tracker_id, k.out_time_dt AS kurasini_exit, t.in_time_dt AS tunduma_entry, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (t.in_time_dt - k.out_time_dt)) / 3600.0 AS transit_hours FROM geofence_visits k JOIN geofence_visits t ON k.tracker_id = t.tracker_id WHERE k.geofence_name = 'KURASINI ALL TOGETHER' AND t.geofence_name = 'TUNDUMA BORDER TZ SIDE' AND t.in_time_dt > k.out_time_dt AND k.out_time_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' AND (t.in_time_dt - k.out_time_dt) < INTERVAL '7 days' ), with_visible AS ( SELECT tl.*, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (gv.out_time_dt - gv.in_time_dt)) / 3600.0) FROM geofence_visits gv WHERE gv.tracker_id = tl.tracker_id AND gv.in_time_dt BETWEEN tl.kurasini_exit AND tl.tunduma_entry AND gv.out_time_dt IS NOT NULL ), 0) AS visible_hours FROM trip_legs tl ), flagged AS ( SELECT *, transit_hours - visible_hours AS invisible_hours FROM with_visible WHERE (transit_hours - visible_hours) > (SELECT AVG(transit_hours - visible_hours) FROM with_visible) ) SELECT f.tracker_id, ROUND(f.invisible_hours::numeric, 1) AS invisible_hours, ROUND(f.transit_hours::numeric, 1) AS total_hours, ( SELECT gv.geofence_name FROM geofence_visits gv WHERE gv.tracker_id = f.tracker_id AND gv.out_time_dt BETWEEN f.kurasini_exit AND f.tunduma_entry AND gv.out_time_dt IS NOT NULL ORDER BY gv.out_time_dt DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS last_known_zone FROM flagged f ORDER BY f.invisible_hours DESC;
training_data.explanation: Identifies trucks with above-average invisible time and their last known geofence before they went off-grid. Useful for security / unauthorized stop investigations.

training_data.question: Show me the full journey history for tanker T123 starting last week.
training_data.sql: SELECT * FROM get_tat_trip_details(NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days', NOW()) WHERE tracker_name = 'T123';
training_data.explanation: Calls the get_tat_trip_details RPC and filters the JSON result for a specific tracker name.

training_data.question: Which depots have the longest loading phase in Kurasini?
training_data.sql: SELECT visit->>'geofence_name' as depot_name, AVG((visit->>'out_time')::timestamp - (visit->>'in_time')::timestamp) as avg_loading_time FROM get_tat_trip_details(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days', NOW()) t, json_array_elements(t.visit_chain) as visit WHERE visit->>'geofence_name' ILIKE '%Depot%' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC;
training_data.explanation: Aggregates loading phase duration from the visit_chain JSON array returned by the RPC.

training_data.question: List all trips that are currently stuck at the destination (DRC/Zambia).
training_data.sql: SELECT tracker_name, dest_name, dest_entry FROM get_tat_trip_details(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days', NOW()) WHERE trip_status = 'at_destination';
training_data.explanation: Filters the RPC output for trips where the calculated trip_status is 'at_destination'.

training_data.question: What is the average time between Kurasini Exit and Dar Geofence Exit?
training_data.sql: SELECT AVG((post_loading_delay_hrs)::numeric) as avg_delay_hrs FROM get_tat_trip_details(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days', NOW());
training_data.explanation: Calculates the average of the pre-calculated post_loading_delay_hrs field from the RPC.
